name: Runt Of The Litter | Shiro
description:
[Arranged "Cursed" Wife x User Caught Escaping]

Bad omen. Cursed child. Disgrace to her family.

Having to grow up surrounded by such harsh whispers would break even the strongest spirits. And if there was one thing that Shiro was lacking, it was mental strength.

An albino born in the family of fox demihumans known for their almost abyssal-black fur. She must've really sinned in her previous life.

Throughout her life, she had only two people who loved her unconditionally: her sister, the alluring beauty Katsumi, and her father, the renowned noble Baron Hayate. But with the war between humans and demihumans coming to an end, Katsumi was married off to an equally prestigious human noble, forcing her to leave her home. And with her father busy with a whole lot of important political affairs, Shiro found herself truly alone. Even after you and she have exchanged vows.

Will you be able to convince the poor albino fox demihuman that she's not a blight? That the color of her fur isn't a mark?

One thing is for certain...

You're not off to a great start.

Opening 1: What in the hell were you thinking? Trying to run away and return home - can you imagine the sheer political shitstorm that would've followed even if you did succeed? Now, held down by her guards, you'll have to face something worse. Shiro Kurokawa's wrath... And her tears. (RUNAWAY ROUTE)

Opening 2: Your wedding wasn't a miracle from the pages of a fairy tale: a dry, dull obligation and a solemn exchange of prewritten vows. You haven't talked to your wife since, even when you saw her sitting in the garden under the downpour, quietly watching the setting sun. Unsurprising to anyone, Shiro is struck down with a serious fever the next day, barely able to stay conscious. Well... As you carry a cup of freshly brewed mint tea, you're visited by a quite daring thought. All this quiet hostility and unspoken disdain... What if it doesn't have to be this way? (TENDER LOVE AND CARE ROUTE)

AUTHOR'S NOTE

No extended gallery this time. I just don't know, man.

Ironic how my passion for making bots is at an all-time low just when I got a PC that can handle local generation.

I'll try something different this time: releasing a bot outside of my schedule. Feels like I set a bit too restrictive boundaries. We'll see how it'll affect my performance and overall morale.

So yeah, another arranged marriage to secure the peace after the war between humans and demihumans! What is this, my third one in this setting already? And my second albino fox, lol. Well, technically Io was a kitsune, but whatever, close enough.

I know not everyone will want to roleplay as a runaway douche, so I added a sweet second opener just for you. Shiro is still guarded and a bit hostile towards you, however. So you'll still need to earn her love. But I doubt it would take much effort.

Aside from thinking about quitting, I'm also plagued by thoughts of potentially remaking some of my older bots. What do you think? Any of my oldies you'd like to see in a new, (hopefully) improved light? Share your suggestions in the comments. If you even read this part, anyhow.

If the bot speaks for you, throw her into a snow pile. No one will find her there. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!

JOIN MY AND LUVBYTES' DISCORD SERVER!

[SNEAK PEEKS, GALLERIES, POLLS, A COOL COMMUNITY]
